_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: over 99% of the cells analyzed were positive for both CD11b and Iba1
details: Over 99% co-labeling with CD11b+ cells in optic nerve, confirming microglia specificity
